titlestmt.titleproper: Collection of Mellon Family and Yale Center for British Art-related Publications
Collection of Mellon Family and Yale Center for British Art-related Publications
titlestmt.author: Cate Peebles

publicationstmt.publisher: Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday August 18, 2020 at 21:00

did.unittitle: Collection of Mellon Family and Yale Center for British Art-related Publications

corpname.part: Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives
Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection contains publications related to the Yale Center for British Art and its directors, the Paul Mellon Centre, Paul Mellon, Rachel Lambert Mellon, the Mellon family, and Louis I. Kahn.

Series 1: Paul Mellon and Mellon family-related publications contains publications that address topics that detail the lives of Paul Mellon and other Mellon family members, including Rachel "Bunny" Lambert Mellon and Andrew W. Mellon, as well as titles that relate to Paul Mellon's collection of sporting and British art, exhibitions of works from his collection, homes, charitable foundations, as well as books about Rachel Mellon's gardening and library of rare books relating to horticulture.

Series 2: Paul Mellon Centre and Yale Center for British Art-related Publications includes books related to the Paul Mellon Centre in London, and the founding, architecture, and art collection of the Yale Center for British Art. Titles in this series also explore Louis Kahn's designs and vision for the Center and the importance of Mellon's legacy to the Yale community.

Series 3: Publications by Directors of the Yale Center for British Art includes books written by former directors of the Yale Center for British Art, including: Jules Prown, Edmund Pillsbury, Duncan Robinson, Patrick McCaughy, and Amy Meyers.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is available without restrictions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Collection of Mellon Family and Yale Center for British Art-related Publications. Yale Center for British Art, Institutional Archives.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The Collection of Mellon Family and Yale Center for British Art related publications was assembled by the Institutional Archives.

This collection is arranged in three series: 1. Paul Mellon and Mellon family-related publications; 2. Paul Mellon Centre and Yale Center for British Art-related Publications; 3. Yale Center for British Art: Publications by Directors. Series 3 is arranged in sections chronologically according to Directors' tenureship at the Center. Within each section, publications have been organized alphabetically by title.

corpname.part: Paul Mellon Centre for Studies in British Art

did.unittitle: Paul Mellon and Mellon family-related Publications
America: Pictured to the Life: Illustrated Works from the Paul Mellon Bequest, by George A Miles and William S. Reese: book
Apollo Magazine: Modern British Art: magazine
The Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library: A Guide to the Collections: book
Bollingen Foundation Report, 1966 and 1977: annual report publication
Books on the Horse and Horsemanship: Riding, Hunting, Breeding Racing, 1400-1941, by John B, Podeschi : a catalogue
The Brick House: A Gallery of British Sporting Art: booklet
British Sporting and Animal Drawings: 1500-1850, by Judy Egerton and Dudley Snelgrove: a catalogue

British Sporting and Animal Paintings, 1655-1867, by Judy Egerton : book purchase pamphlet
British Sporting and Animal Prints 1658-1874, by Dudley Snelgrove: a catalogue
British Sporting Paintings: the Paul Mellon collection in the Virginia Museum of Fine Arts, by Judy Edgerton: book
Bunny Mellon: The Life of an American Style Legend, by Meryl Gordon

Christie's "Works of Art Collected by Paul Mellon": auction catalogue

Curtis's Botanical Magazine: John Bradby Blake Special Part, Volume 34, part 4, December 2017: magazine

English Drawings and Watercolors 1550-1850 in the Collection of Mr. and Mrs. Paul Mellon, by John Baskett and Dudley Snelgrove: book
The Gardens of Bunny Mellon, by Linda Jane Holden: book
The Horse in Art, by John Baskett: book
Jean Schlumberger: The Rachel Lambert Mellon Collection from the Virginia Museum of Fine Arts, catalougue by Kristie Couser: book
Mellon: An American Life, by David Cannadine: book
Monumentum Spring 2009: pamphlet
National Gallery of Art: Art History in Latin America: grant report
National Gallery of Art: English Drawings and Water Colors from the Collection of Mr. and Mrs. Paul Mellon, foreword by John Walker: exhibition catalogue
National Gallery of Art: John Constable: A Selection of Paintings From the Collection of Mr. and Mrs. Paul Mellon, April 30 - November 1,1969, by John Walker and Ross Watson: exhibition catalogue
National Gallery of Art: William Hogarth: A Selection of Paintings from the Collection of Mr. and Mrs. Paul Mellon, February 12 - May 30, 1971, by Ross Watson: exhibition catalogue

National Gallery of Art: J.M.W. Turner: A Selection of Paintings from the Collection of Mr. and Mrs. Paul Mellon,October 31, 1968 - April 21, 1969, by John Walker and Ross Watson: exhibition catalogue

National Gallery of Art: Joseph Wright of Derby: A Selection of Paintings from the Collection of Mr. and Mrs. Paul Mellon, November 22 - May 1, 1971, by John Walker and Ross Watson: exhibition catalogue
National Museum of Racing: British Racing Paintings from the Collections of Mr Paul Mellon, The YCBA and the Virginia Museum of Fine Art, Judy Egerton and Duncan Robinson: exhibition catalogue

An Oak Spring Flora: Flower Illustration from the Fifteenth Century to the Present Time: A Selection of the Rare Books, Manuscripts, and Works of Art in the Collection of Rachel Lambert Mellon, by Lucia Tongiorgi Tomasi: book

An Oak Spring Herbaria: Herbs and Herbals from the Fourteenth to the Nineteenth Centuries: A Selection of the Rare Books, Manuscripts and Works of Art in the Collection of Rachel Lambert Mellon, by Lucia Tongiorgi Tomasi: book
An Oak Spring Pomona: a selection of the rare books on fruit in the Oak Spring Garden Library, by Sandra Raphael: book
An Oak Spring Sylva: a selection of the rare books on trees in the Oak Spring Garden Library, by Sandra Raphael: book
Painting in England 1700-1850: From the Collection of Mr. and Mrs. Paul Mellon, VMFA, 1963, edited by Basil Taylor: book
